bb_pctb.note: Values outside 0-1 are normal during breakouts; only flag truly extreme values

_comments.bb_pctb: Widened from [-0.5, 1.5]: values in [-1.0,-0.5] and [1.5,2.0] are legitimate breakout behavior
_comments.ema_stuck_days_threshold: Flag an EMA as stuck (computation error) if it has the same value for this many consecutive trading days
_comments.weekly_volume_min_ratio: Flag a week only if its volume is below this fraction of (trading_days × local_avg_daily_volume); the reference average uses a rolling ±42-day window (~60 trading days) so early low-volume tickers aren't compared against inflated all-time averages
_comments.warmup_rows: Rows per ticker to skip at the start of range checks (ta library warm-up period)
_comments.weekly_pattern_warn_zero_window_weeks: Warn if no patterns_weekly rows exist across all active tickers in the most recent N closed weeks (zero-detection signal)
_comments.weekly_pattern_structural_warn_high: Warn if any ticker exceeds this many structural patterns_weekly rows over its full history (separate from the daily threshold of 2000)
_comments.monthly_pattern_warn_zero_window_months: Warn if no patterns_monthly rows exist across all active tickers in the most recent N closed months
_comments.weekly_divergence_warn_zero_window_days: Warn if no divergences_weekly rows exist across all active tickers within this many days (lower bound only — no upper threshold)
_comments.monthly_divergence_warn_zero_window_mont: Warn if no divergences_monthly rows exist across all active tickers within this many months
_comments.weekly_crossover_warn_zero_window_days: Warn if no crossovers_weekly rows exist across all active tickers within this many days
_comments.monthly_crossover_warn_zero_window_month: Warn if no crossovers_monthly rows exist across all active tickers within this many months
_comments.weekly_score_coverage_window_weeks: Score coverage check considers tickers that have indicators_weekly rows in the most recent N weeks; missing scores_weekly counts as a coverage gap
_comments.monthly_score_coverage_window_months: Score coverage check considers tickers that have indicators_monthly rows in the most recent N months
_comments.category_math_window_days: How far back to validate weekly/monthly category math (composite ≈ clamp(sum(category × weight) × expansion_factor)). Avoids scanning full history.
_comments.category_math_tolerance: Absolute tolerance (in score points) for the category-math equality check. Tight (0.01) because the formula is deterministic.
